companies.name: 512 Doncaster
companies.about:
At 512 we recognise that it is actually the needs of YOUR client which determines what WE do – but it is how we deliver all options to YOU which makes us unique in the Extraordinary World of Trade! Together our aim is to keep your client coming back to you and hopefully you to us!						
We would like to be your 1st choice provider for Export and Import services.
companies.servicesOffered:
SERVICES			
ROAD FREIGHT AND HANDLING			
AIRFREIGHT SERVICES			
CROSS TRADE MANAGEMENT			
OCEAN FREIGHT SERVICES			
WAREHOUSING AND DISTRIBUTION			
COURIER			
CUSTOMS BROKERAGE			
NOW (SAME DAY/DEDICATED SERVICES)
